methods_skipped: SelectiveNet: checkpoints not found. Run: python project/train_selectivenet.py --coverage all (GPU ~15min), then re-run this script.
MC-Dropout exact UQ: per-sample T-pass variance not saved. Using confidence of mean prediction as proxy. TODO: re-run run_mcdropout_baseline with variance logging for exact method.

honesty_check.C2_4_check: NOTE: retake risk lower than Direct at full coverage — double-check coverage alignment

chow.note: Chow 1970 / Geifman&El-Yaniv 2017; abstain = low max-softmax confidence

ensemble.note: Deep Ensemble 3-seed (s42/s123/s2024); uncertainty = predictive variance. TODO: s456/s789 ckpts missing, ideally 5-seed per paper.

mcdropout.note: MC-Dropout T=30 (N_MCD=30 in run_experiments.py). Uncertainty proxy = 1 - max(p, 1-p) of averaged prediction. TODO: exact MC-Dropout UQ requires re-running inference with per-sample variance logging (not yet saved in itb_predictions.csv I baseline).

retake.note: Query-for-retake: abstain when qbar < tau (image quality signal). Orthogonal to prediction confidence. Prediction model = Std VIB. KEY DISTINCTION: retake triggers re-acquisition (new image request); other methods defer to human. On ITB-LQ static benchmark, modelled as abstention on qbar signal.
